title: OverallsOC
description: Rename leather pants to turn into dyeable overalls!
body:
![banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac0afb3a3a941425bfa8efbba1197b7edd1ed673.png)

## Description
OverallsOC is a texture pack that changes leather pants texture with a cute overalls that can be colored with any color you want just by renaming in an anvil.

## Important notes
- This pack requires CIT Resewn or Optifine!
- There's a version that doesn't require optifine: [Overalls](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overalls)
- You can dye your overalls through a armor color generator site: [GAMERGEEKS](https://www.gamergeeks.net/apps/minecraft/give-command-generator/armor)
- Command to get colored leather armor in creative mode: /give @a leather_leggings[dyed_color=3847130]
- Go to the gallery to see examples

## How it works
- Rename a leather pants in an anvil with the name "Overalls"
- Dye it with any color using the same leather armor coloring system that vanilla uses

## See More:
[CURSEFORGE](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/overallsoc)
